steps.title: Spot the size contrast
steps.content: The passage uses but to signal a key difference: P. seppenradensis was much larger than P. leptophylla. The blank refers to this size contrast that the research seeks to explain.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Disparity means a noticeable difference or inequality — the precise word for the size contrast between the two species. Enmity (hatred), anomaly (unexpected deviation), and ambiguity (unclear meaning) don't apply to size comparisons. A is correct.
